title: ReviewRequest
description: STORY-032.1: the envelope sent to the Reviewer (EPIC-022). Carries the failing output, acceptance, diff, and gene signals — never any implementation history or agent reasoning (anti-anchoring).

failing_test_output.description: The failing test/validation output the Reviewer reasons from.

acceptance_criteria.description: The acceptance the change is judged against.

diff_under_review.description: The diff being reviewed (result, not the author's reasoning).

matching_genes.description: Failure-bank gene signals informing the review.
